mapsApp.title: Default maps app
mapsApp.msg: Choose your navigation app. This choice will be saved and can be changed in Settings.

map.loadingBody: City switching and filters will be available in {{countdown}}.

bulkUnflash.title: Unmark all
bulkUnflash.msg: Remove the flash mark from all Invaders?

route.allFlashed: All Invaders on this route are flashed!
route.corridorInfo: The corridor is the maximum distance around your route in which the app searches for Invaders. The wider it is, the more you see — but some will be a bit further from your path.

error.noGps: GPS unavailable. Please enable location services and try again.
error.routeNotFound: Route not found between these two points

route.noInvadersHint: Try widening the search corridor around the route.

error.noInvadersReachable: No Invaders to flash here with your settings. Try increasing the duration, widening the area, or turning off the “unflashed only” filter.

onboarding.locationDenied: Location was denied. You can enable it later in your phone's Settings. The app works without GPS (map and list available).

welcome.title: $t(common.appName)
welcome.subtitle: Hunt Space Invader mosaics across Paris.

map.title: Map & Flash
map.body: Find Space Invader mosaics around you. Mark each one you've flashed and track your progress in Scores. By default, the map shows only the Invaders you still have to flash — show flashed and destroyed ones anytime via the filters.

route.title: Route & Hunt
route.body: Discover Invaders along your route from A to B. Or generate an optimised hunt based on your time and transport.

location.title: Location
location.body: The app uses your location to show you on the map and calculate routes. Your data stays on your device.

empty.title: Ready to hunt?
empty.body: Flash your first Invader and watch your stats come to life.

activity.onlyTotal: Flash more Invaders to see your activity over time — existing progress is kept, just without timestamps.

chart.insufficient: Keep flashing for a few more weeks to see your progress curve.

rate.projection: At this pace, {{city}} is done in ~{{months}} months.
rate.projectionSoon: Almost there — {{city}} done in under a month!
rate.notEnoughData: Keep going for a few weeks to see your projection.

profile.localBadge: Local profile — stored on this device

rarity.label: Rarity
rarity.info: Average points of the Invaders you've flashed. Aim for high-value ones to lean toward “Sniper”; otherwise toward “Collector”.

geography.label: Geography
geography.info: How much you explore. Based on the number of different cities (and districts) where you've flashed. The more you roam, the more you lean toward “Explorer”.

assiduity.label: Consistency
assiduity.info: Your regularity over time: active days and best streak of consecutive days. The more often you play, the more you lean toward “Regular”.

empty.sliders: Flash a few Invaders to reveal your hunter profile.
empty.dayNight: Keep flashing to uncover your day/night rhythm.
empty.geo: Explore more Invaders to draw your zone map.
empty.curve: Your progress curve will appear with your first dated flashes.

profile.permissionLibrary: Allow photo access in Settings to choose an image.
profile.permissionCamera: Allow camera access in Settings to take a photo.

about.title: About
about.appPitch: Find Space Invader mosaics wherever you are.
about.thanks1: Thanks to Camille B. for converting me into an Invader hunter through our travels.
about.thanks2: Thanks to Benoît B. for showing me that true enthusiasts existed and deserved a smoother experience.
about.legalText: $t(common.appName) is an independent fan project, unofficial and unaffiliated with the artist Invader or the FlashInvaders app. Space Invader mosaics are the work and exclusive property of the artist Invader. This application is not authorised, sponsored, or approved by the artist.

labels.noLabelHint: Create the first one with the button below.
labels.confirmDeleteMsg: The label will be removed from all Invaders.
labels.resetMsg: Custom colors and Invader coloring will be reset. Your progress (flashed Invaders) is preserved.

timeline.resetHint: Clears flash dates (keeps your flashes). Time-based stats reset; totals and % kept.
timeline.resetMsg: Flash dates will be cleared (curve, streak, best day, day/night reset). Your flashed Invaders, totals and percentages are kept.

feedback.noMailBody: No email app is set up on this device. Add a mail account and try again.

idea.title: Got an idea?
idea.intro: A suggestion, a remark, a bug? Drop me a line — it'll open your mail app.
idea.note: No data is collected. This just opens your email app.

status.pickBody: What's the real state of Invader {{id}}?

empty.title: No news
empty.body: No recent changes for your selected cities. Check back later!

picker.title: My cities
picker.subtitle: Choose which cities to follow in the news feed.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.body: The coordinates for {{id}} will be added soon.

stroll.title: Stroll mode

comingSoon.body: Your settings are saved right now, but alerts require the next version of the app. For now, no alert is sent yet.

stroll.whatBody: Get alerted when you walk near an Invader you haven't flashed yet — even with your phone in your pocket — while you roam freely.
stroll.vsTrajetBody: Route tracking guides you along a calculated itinerary. Stroll mode watches in the background with no set route: walk wherever you like.
stroll.enableHint: Watches for Invaders around you as you move.
stroll.radiusHint: You'll be alerted when an Invader is closer than this distance.
stroll.footnote: Stroll mode uses geofencing: no continuous GPS, battery-friendly. Requires “Always” location permission to work when the app is closed.

notif.title: Invader nearby 👾
notif.body: {{id}} is right next to you — go flash it!

perm.deniedBody: Stroll mode needs your location to alert you near Invaders. Enable location in iOS Settings.
perm.bgBody: To be alerted even when the app is closed, choose “Always Allow” for location in Settings. For now, you'll only be alerted while the app is open.

fallback.title: Alerts limited to app open
fallback.body: Without “Always” permission, alerts only fire while the app is open. Enable “Always Allow” in iOS Settings for in-pocket use.

stroll.statusNote: Already flashed and destroyed are always excluded.

error.routeNotFound: Route not found between these two points
error.limit: Temporary limit reached, please try again later.

gallery.title: Trophies
gallery.empty: Go hunting to earn your first trophies 👾

share.textKm: I walked {{km}} km and flashed {{count}} Invaders in {{city}} with InvaderQuest 👾
share.textNoKm: I flashed {{count}} Invaders in {{city}} with InvaderQuest 👾
share.unavailable: Sharing is not available on this device.

guide.title: How it works
guide.intro: Welcome! InvaderQuest helps you spot and flash Space Invader mosaics. Everything is free and your data stays on your phone. Here's how to get the most out of each mode.

carte.title: The map
carte.benefit: Your playground: every Invader around you, colored by its state. By default you only see the ones you still have to flash.
steps: Each alien has a color for its state (OK, damaged, destroyed, unverified — and “flashed” once marked).
Tap an Invader to open its card (points, hint, Instagram link) and mark it as flashed.
Open the filters to show or hide flashed, destroyed ones, etc.

chasse.title: Hunt
chasse.benefit: Tell the app how much time you have: it plots the best loop to flash as many Invaders as possible and bring you back to your start.
steps: Pick your duration (30 min, 1 h, 2 h…) and mode (walking or cycling).
Pick an area: around you, or one or more districts.
Tap Generate for the loop route, then Start to be guided.

trajet.title: Route
trajet.benefit: Going from A to B? Discover every Invader to flash along your way.
steps: Enter your start and destination (or start from your location).
Adjust the width of the search corridor around the route.
Follow the list of Invaders on the way and flash them as you go.

balade.title: Stroll mode
balade.benefit: Let the app watch for you: it alerts you when you pass near an unflashed Invader, even when the app is closed.
steps: Turn on Stroll mode from the menu.
Allow “Always” location access (required for background alerts).
Just walk around: you get a notification near an Invader.

palmares.title: Rankings & cities
palmares.benefit: See your progress city by city, and district by district in Paris.
steps: Open Rankings from the menu.
Check your completion percentage per city and per area.
Switch city to explore and flash elsewhere.

stats.title: Stats & profile
stats.benefit: Track your progress over time and shape your hunter profile.
steps: Open Stats from the menu.
Look at your progress curve, streaks and trophies.
Customize your nickname and avatar at the top of the page.

news.title: News
news.benefit: Stay up to date with what's new and recently added Invaders in your cities.
steps: Open News from the menu (a dot signals what's new).
Subscribe to the cities you care about to follow their updates.
Come back regularly: data refreshes automatically.

flash.title: Mark your flashes
flash.benefit: Keep track of what you've already flashed — one by one, or in bulk.
steps: On an Invader's card, tap the button to mark it as flashed.
In the List, mark several Invaders at once and filter by status.
Use labels to organize your Invaders your way.
